ogTitle: Beaumaris vs Beauty Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beaumaris and Beauty Point.
heading: Beaumaris vs Beauty Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beaumaris, Tasmania and Beauty Point, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaumaris has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Beauty Point (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beaumaris or Beauty Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beaumaris has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Beauty Point scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beaumaris scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Beauty Point scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beaumaris or Beauty Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaumaris has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
